title: TheKrepuchka Simple Voice Chat
description: Texture pack / Resource Pack for the Simple Voice Chat mod created by TheKrepuchka
body:
# TheKrepuchka Simple Voice Chat
Texture pack / Resource Pack for the [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) mod created by TheKrepuchka!!!
This Texture pack will change some icons in mod Simple Voice Chat! Change the red color to green! (Since I like it better) and will change the icons of the groups!
# Downloads
- [Minecraft Planet](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/thekrepe-simple-voice-chat/)
- [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/thekrepe-simple-voice-chat)
# Official Simple Voice Chat
Please join the Discord if you have questions!
[Official Voice Chat Discord Server](https://discord.com/invite/4dH2zwTmyX)
![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e1937b6f30f595539ef11a362b2bea4df1cf4b1.png)
